rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CLARENCE HANKINS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions, And Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion to Compel Responses to Form Interrogatories, Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Requests for Admissions, and Requests for Inspection and Production of Documents is granted. The Requests for Admission, Set One, are admitted for the truth of the matter asserted. Monetary sanctions are awarded under CCP § 2023.030 in the amount of $60 for reasonable expenses, plus reasonable attorneys fees. Petitioner's request for issue, terminating, and/or evidentiary sanctions is denied without prejudice. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, February 13, 2018.
